Stuff are so ride certainly terry
Great place to stay but stuff are extremely rude .
Not good experience . Might be cheaper then going ther place but and big but
Quite expensive for what it is. But close to Perth

This place made us feel literally unsafe during our stay. It’s an awful caravan park. My partner and I stayed here for a few nights thinking it was an actual caravan park. It’s just a bunch of people permanently living there. Which is normally fine but this was 97% of the park living there. The unpowered sites were 4 very cramped spots in the corner of the park with no space for anything. Felt so unsafe during our stay, having people come up to us asking what we had in the car as if they wanted to steal it. The amenities weren’t bad until the day that they had some water issues during one of the days of our stay which is fine, Stuff happens. But people still used the bathrooms without being able to flush, it took over 24h for them to go in and flush peoples business down the toilet and re clean them. So gross and neglected. Just pay the $40 and go to a big4 instead. This was way too overpriced for what it was.

Bathrooms and facilities cleaned regularly and are up 2 scratch. Laundromat and outside clothes lines available aswell. Outdoor covered bbq area, with fridge, microwave, kettle, BBQs and picnic table facilities and grassy area for camping. Swimming pool at the front of the Park. Aside for that, nothing flash or any extra amenities available. Pretty standard/Average. The dog run at the rear of the camping area isn't really sufficient due to construction at the boundary and the park does have power fluctuations frequently/daily due to the power being bypassed through a generator. Aside from those minor challenges the park is kept clean, neat and tidy and an respectful environment with lovely residents and family atmosphere.
Bon emplacement, prix légèrement élevé et personnel de l’accueil sans plus. Toilettes très propres bon point.

Don't ask to use the Dump Point if you are not booked in. I offered to pay, but the answer was still no. There are no public dump points within 50klms of Kalamunda.
Merry Christmas.

Non abbiamo soggiornato in questo Caravan Park e forse é stato meglio così considerando il grado di NON accoglienza del personale.

Ho mandato una e-mail chiedendo la disponibilità che é stata confermata, per prenotare dovevo chiamare il numero.
Abbiamo chiamato la prima volta e quando abbiamo iniziato a parlare ci hanno riattaccato il telefono.
Abbiamo pensato fosse un problema di rete perché stavamo guidando in una zona remota, ma il telefono é andato avanti a squillare per tutte le 5 volte successive che abbiamo riprovato.

Finalmente riusciamo ad avere risposta e la signora al telefono dice “vi richiamo dopo pranzo”.
Ovviamente non abbiamo ricevuto chiamate, abbiamo riprovato ancora noi e diceva di non sentire ciò che stavamo dicendo (peccato che però rispondesse alle nostre domande)

Alla fine ha concluso ancora chiudendo la chiamata e non ha piú risposto neanche alle mie email.

Se potessi dare 0 stelle lo farei volentieri.
Very clean👋👍
Best Banh Mi in Perth!
Office staff are rude we got promised a full time cabin then was asked to leave.the cabin we stayed in had mould in it
Was easy. I was only there over night. Plenty of hot water. Barthrooms were clean. Lady serving was nice.
Clean. Quiet. Safe
Very clean park, lots of permanent residents, clean shower/toilet areas!
It's a very clean site mostly long-term people there toilets and showers cleaned 2 times a day
Couldn't get an ensuite cabin, disappointing
Saw outside there but was just driving past. However, from what I saw, it looked quite lovely...neat and clean and attractive to people looking for a place to stay...🙂
Presents very well, and the place is extremely quiet and well managed, although still busy. I would highly recommend this park based on first impressions.

The bathroom are really clean, but a lot of noise in the late night
Motorbikes around of the camp

Have stay quiet a few times with previous management of park couldn’t fault, always
clean ablutions block and greeted.
Since new management taken over late last year 2024 very poorly managed given a site on arrival it had already been given out, so back to the office to inform and given another. The ablution block was unclean and dirty. Just in general overall the park has deteriorated.
I Want  be staying there again.
Good caravan park with pool and very clean bathroom. The camp kitchen was clean as well, around $50 per night but the amenities are good

They told us to leave with caravan a day earlier. Check out had to be on Monday but one of their workers came to us at Sunday morning 10.15 AM telling "what are we still doing here?!? You had to be gone by 10 AM. Another caravan is already waiting" so we got another 45min to pack our things and get out...
About 2 hrs after leaving caravan park, I went back to see if there was another caravan parked there but the site was empty, I bet it's still empty and they are being just silly old people who have nothing better to do than bullying young backpackers. It's second week running when I left and I am still waiting for to get my bond money back...they told to wait another week....(it's been 4 weeks since I haven't received bond money, reported to consumer protection for holding bond money without reason)
Being about a week in caravan park, there was process of emptying Septic and the smell was so bad, even at 100m away it filled my caravan and I had to left the park, whole thing lasted about 30min. Bad energy in there, I don't recommend this park at all!!!
Top notch
I was so surprised how  many people live there . It looked very clean and in a nice area.

Crystal Brook Caravan Park is a very nice chilled and relaxing place located at the foot of hills walking trails just a short 10min drive away it also features a lovely swimming pool area laundry $5per wash drys $5each clotheslines toilets showers available and kept very clean BBQ area outside kitchen available camping powered sites available Caravan powered site's All the residents are friendly and lovely people the office staff are friendly and helpful The self contained room's are very clean furnished with sml kitchen separate Bedroom car parking available for 1 vehicle when making a booking  outside of your room gas oven and stove tops All in all Great Chilled and Relaxing place to stay on your next holiday 10/10 💯%

Clean and tidy caravan park toilet and laundry always cleaned lovely people in the park but the people at the office are horrible and disrespectful have been in and out of here for the past year and apparently have no record of me on the system been here for two weeks and on day two has kicked myself and my 5month old daughter to the street. No reasons given they called the police and police have done nothing but say I am allowed here and don’t have to leave when rent is paid. They not only have done this to myself but are also harassing other people in the park who are generally good people some are family of mine. I would not recommend this caravan park to anyone it’s definitely not the same as it was a year ago when I first moved here.
The only nice thing about here is that the people who live here are friendly, mainly permanent residents.
My mum taught me: if you can't say something nice, don't say anything.

Stayed two nights early Nov 2024.  This park contains mainly permanent residents with a few caravan sites sporadically in among the permanent set ups.  There is a caravan “alley” on the side of the park which contains a mix of what appears to be permanent and semi permanent guests in caravans.  The site we had was huge and level with power water and sullage.  The centrally located ablution blocks are modern, clean and functional.  This is a park you stay at for access to the nearby (7km) Perth Airport.  The park has a very clean and modern swimming pool but there are no retail services within walking distance however shopping is only a short few minutes drive away.  The permanents we spoke to were friendly but kept to themselves.  I was happy to stay at the park as it suited our needs as we had use the airport for a lightening interstate visit and wanted to be close to the airport.  In terms of a family looking / choosing caravan park to holiday at in Perth there might be better options when you consider closeness to CBD, park facilities for kids and ambience, however this is not a negative for this park as it is not pretentious and provides honest value for money..  This park is good $$ value for what you get and will suit your budget if you don’t want to pay for all the bells and whistles (and price) that come along with the big chain caravan parks.  The receptionist at the front office  was nice, engaging and professional and did us a favour letting is in earlier than anticipated on our day which was much appreciated by us.  I am happy to recommend this park for the market it is designed for. Stay well and travel safe.
Not a bad camp site when staying near Perth hills.... friendly staff, clean shower block and toilets.... good people who live on site....
Great park but booked for 14 days and was had to leave after 2 nights due to poor administration skills of the attendant that booked us in so had to find somewhere else. Very poor service from admin

Thought I would try this park after staying at another not so far away previously, ha what a joke. Ring to make the booking only to be told to ring back later as customers in office, we'll ok. Then tried twice again only to have a recording to say they are closed! Didn't leave much confidence in staying here.
Great site ! Great people! Love it

Found this place by accident whilst looking for something to eat after our long hike on the trails in the Bickley area. A very pleasant surprise was the authentic Vietnamese Crispy Pork Bahn Mi on the menu. A good selection of Rolls, Wraps, Sausage Rolls, Spring Rolls, Chicken and Chips to name a few, were also available. Very friendly and efficient staff finished it all off. Definitely a place to revisit when in the area
Thanks to Bec and the Crystal Brook caravan park team for making our stay most enjoyable. Very neat and tidy cabin and all ammenities were great definitely recommend

Stayed a couple of days to recharge and clean everything. Caravan park was clean and tidy, despite a rather heavy downpour the previous day. Facilities were great. Showers and laundry.
They have a little get together each night around a fire which is great. Carnarvon is a fantastic place. Plenty going for it.
Visited a number of the things in the area.
1 mile jetty museum was great, all the history of the HMAS Sydney and the history of Carnarvon and surrounds.
J'ai rarement vu tes douches et toilettes aussi propre ! Malgré le prix un peu excessif (mais pas plus que les autres), c'est un bon camping.
Pleasant place to camp near so much in Perth to do
Are cats allowed
Owners and management couldn't care less about any of their tenants.

This park is sooo lovely. Feels like a rural spot….cookaburras wake us up….Roos hang round at night. But anll the major shops anre ten minutes anway!  All facilities are spotless…neighbours are lovely. We feel like we hit the jackpot when we landed here.
My mate lives here. Place is clean & tidy
I dream about living here

I was privileged to call Crystal Brook Caravan Park home for the last 6 months and feel compelled to share the great experience and recommend this park to everyone and anyone for any reason be it FIFO, long term, short term, overnight etc.

Management of this park are absolutely professional yet friendly and approachable.  Well run by the team.  Will always hear your dilemma and assist if they can, if not a solution is offered or suggested.  I reiterate professional, will not get involved in drama but will sort our riff raff.  Park is extremely well maintained with excellent ablution and laundry facilities.  Hot water at its best, amazing showers, cubicles are large, water pressure amazing, hot water, shiny sparkly clean and very adequate for the entire park.  To keep ablutions clean for the amount and size of the park like they are is an indication of how well the park is maintained.  Maintenance is always completed even at 0400 in the morning if a tap is blown off because of pressure.

I am sorry to leave as it has been home and comfy and safe.  I commend the management of the park and thank the owners for employing the high standard of management they have, it makes the difference of the park not being mediocre but an amazing living/holidaying experience.

A huge resounding THANK YOU from me for the amazing experience and all the assistance, help and great service from all.  Keep up the great work.  Sandy and Trevor, you make a difference.
Had short stay nice carvan park
Average service...Not impressed.
It's a good park that is a little out of the way. Navigating around the park can be a bit tight for big vans, but staff are more than willing to assist.

Too Cramped for my Liking so didn't stay..Got lacoated right next to Dump Point🤢I mean couldn't smell it but nobody was dumping there disposables in the 15mins we were there.... for 49$..it's a HUGE NO from me
Great place to stay
Very nice and clean park and staff are always very helpful and friendly thanks to the staff keep up the good work happy camper

Great service here which reflects back to people staying here, everyone is extremely friendly & happy .
For the staff.  Nothing is toooo much trouble for them , they are always Helpful.
Especially the reception.
I will certainly pass on the good word in my travels .
Cheers all    Rob
great little van park lovely spot nice base to explore the surrounding area
Very updated 🚻 and showers
Some of the residents are so judgemental and very rude. Not friendly and they had a go with the visitors. The management have to do something with this rude people.

Staff are very friendly & accommodating.
The ladies in the office were always smiling & a pleasure to talk to.
My husband & I stayed here for 5 months while living in Perth.
Park is clean & well maintained.
The staff put a lot of care & detail into making the park a very enjoyable place to live.
If we were to return to Perth, we would most definitely stay here again.
Can’t recommend it enough!!

Not very well run, they try to move you on a day early if you book a week.Fair price though.& They re-book your spot for same day they want you out.I stayed 2weeks from Thursday,was supposed to be out Wednesday morning.
GREAT Caravan Park 😍

The facilities  are super  clean at all times the showers  toilets and laundry areas residents and visitors  alike very friendly. And the little shop at the end sells delish hot eat in or takeaway food. A must for every traveller.

Long term residents are not very friendly. Not kid Friendly.
Alot of strange people come to this park.....
Names the streets after kids. Which is cool but why??
Park needs to be under investigation..
Great park for longer term stay. Close to city.
Great caravan park highly recommend
Great place,
Very lovely staff showed my mum and I around the park felt very homly. Thank you Trevor for you time today your a absolute legend very nice man .30/6/23 Shirley and steve
Closed on Sunday's and public holidays, a holiday park that is closed on holidays great job
Excellent caravan park.  Large sites. Friendly locals. Safe location.  Showers and toilets 🚻 were clean. Laundry facilities clean.

Great park to stay in.
Friendly staff and handy clean facilities.
